channel.title: ELAN Microelectronics Corp. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by ELAN Microelectronics Corp. (elan).

item.title: CVE-2024-0454 · 6 MEDIUM — Security Vulnerability on Match-on-Chip FPR Architecture
item.description: ELAN Match-on-Chip FPR solution has design fault about potential risk of valid SID leakage and enumeration with spoof sensor. This fault leads to that Windows Hello recognition would be bypass with cloning SID to cause broken account identity. Versio…
